accepted.reason: Array stacking and integer range construction are compact utility kernels with straightforward loop optimization patterns.
AABB intersection/containment predicates are geometric primitives with branch-heavy logic useful for conversion quality.
Percent-error and weighted least-squares metrics are realistic numeric loss kernels with repeated element-wise loops.
Nested-loop RBF evaluation is a clear O(N^2*D) hotspot and strong target for Cython speedup traces.
Cell-block sparse update loop is simple, deterministic, and representative of low-level numerical data movement.

skipped.reason: Large phylogenetics pipeline with project-specific dependencies and domain coupling; better curated separately.
Heavy OpenMP/kernel integration and internal API coupling make this less suitable as a standalone GRPO example.
Data-preprocessing class is largely application orchestration and object-state handling rather than focused compute kernels.
Broad vector utility module is extensive and mixed-purpose; deferred in favor of tighter standalone kernels in this batch.
Sparse-format specific ztz accumulation logic depends on complex CSR/LIL conventions and warrants dedicated curation pass.
